name: doc-watcher
description: Audit configured local repositories for documentation semantic drift and support operator-reviewed alignment or cleanup.

interface.longDescription: DocWatcher monitors configured local repositories, collects read-only evidence about documentation, commits, links, and terminology drift, produces audit summaries for operator review, and packages doc-alignment plus housekeeping workflows for explicit implementation or cleanup requests.
defaultPrompt: Audit configured repositories for documentation semantic drift, or use doc-alignment/housekeeping after explicit implementation scope is accepted
